meta.notes: Repo moved from sst/opencode to anomalyco/opencode in early 2026.
meta.tldr: This release focuses on improving existing features and fixing key issues. Permission configurations now preserve rule order and offer full IntelliSense for tool permission keys, enhancing control and clarity. LSP permission prompts now include request details like operation, file, and cursor position, providing more context for access decisions. Shell commands now maintain the correct working directory after login shell startup files are executed, resolving a potential workflow disruption. GPT-5.5 with OpenAI OAuth now uses the correct context limits, preventing compaction issues and ensuring stable performance. Roslyn LSP support for Razor, `.cshtml`, and C# script files has been added, improving the development experience for those working with these file types. These changes collectively enhance the stability, usability, and security of opencode, making this a recommended upgrade for all users.

features.name: Multi-Provider Support
features.description: Provider-agnostic design. Switch between Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Copilot, Bedrock, and local models from a single config.
key_details: small_model field: lightweight tasks (title gen). Falls back to main model if unavailable.
OpenCode Zen: /connect in TUI → select opencode → sign in at opencode.ai/auth
GitLab 1M context window: beta header enabled (1.2.24)

features.name: Desktop App
features.description: Full Electron application with forked Ghostty terminal, file tree, review panel, interactive timeline, and deep links.
key_details: Full Electron app with forked Ghostty terminal embedded
Deep links: opencode:// for session creation

features.name: Server Mode
features.description: Expose OpenCode as a server with web UI, mDNS discovery, and CORS config.
key_details: mDNS service discovery — devices on same network find your server

features.name: Agents (Primary + Subagents)
features.description: Two agent types: primary agents (cycle with Tab) and subagents (specialized, invoked with @mention).

built_in_agents.name: General
built_in_agents.purpose: Multi-step tasks with full tools (except todo)

features.custom_agent_format: Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Filename becomes agent name.

agent_frontmatter_fields.permission: object — per-tool: ask | allow | deny. Glob patterns for bash.
agent_frontmatter_fields.default_agent: build | plan | custom — set default primary

navigation: Ctrl+Right / Ctrl+Left — navigate parent ↔ child sessions

features.name: Auto-Compaction
features.description: Automatic recovery from 413 Request Entity Too Large errors. Compacts context and retries transparently.

features.name: Session Sharing
features.description: Create shareable conversation links. /share copies link to clipboard.

features.name: Undo / Redo
features.description: Revert last changes and retry with edited prompt.
key_details: /undo — revert last changes, show original prompt
Edit the prompt after undo and retry

features.name: Config Layering
features.description: 6-layer config precedence. Configs merge, not replace — non-conflicting settings from all layers preserved.
layers: Remote config (.well-known/opencode) — org defaults, lowest priority
Inline config (OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT env var) — highest priority

features.name: Permissions System
features.description: Per-tool permissions with ask, allow, deny. Glob patterns for bash. Last matching rule wins.
key_details: Last matching rule wins — put * first, specifics after

features.name: MCP Servers
features.description: Remote and local MCP server support. Toggle via /mcp in TUI.

features.name: Workspace Support
features.description: Initial workspace support in TUI. Workspace container in desktop sidebar.

features.name: SDK
features.description: Published SDK for programmatic OpenCode access.

features.name: GitLab Agent Platform
features.description: GitLab Agent Platform is now fully supported with automatic discovery of workflow models from your GitLab instance. Workflow models can use opencode's local tools (file read/write, shell, etc.) over WebSocket.

features.name: Git-backed Session Review
features.description: Added git-backed session review modes, enabling users to review uncommitted changes and branch diffs directly within opencode. Git changes are now the default review source with the desktop review tree staying synchronized with your selected source.

features.name: Multistep Authentication
features.description: Desktop app now supports multistep authentication flows, enabling login with OAuth providers, SAML, and other complex auth methods directly in the app. Providers that require additional questions during authentication are now fully supported.

features.name: Interactive Update Flow
features.description: Major and minor updates now show a confirmation dialog before upgrading, allowing you to review changes before updating. You can also skip specific versions if you prefer to stay on your current release.

features.name: Node.js Support
features.description: opencode can now run on Node.js in addition to Bun, with a dedicated Node.js entry point and build script that bundles the server with database migrations.

features.name: Poe Authentication Provider
features.description: Added Poe as a built-in authentication provider with OAuth and API key support

features.name: Token Caching for Amazon Bedrock
features.description: Enabled token caching for custom Amazon Bedrock providers

features.name: Syntax Highlighting Support
features.description: Added syntax highlighting support for Kotlin, HCL, Lua, and TOML files

features.name: Manual Lock/Unlock for Theme Mode
features.description: Added manual lock/unlock for theme mode

features.name: Heap Snapshot Functionality
features.description: Allows users to capture memory snapshots of both TUI and server processes via the "Write heap snapshot" command. Snapshots are saved to `tui.heapsnapshot` and `server.heapsnapshot` files.

features.name: Event-Sourced Syncing System
features.description: Initial implementation of event-sourced syncing system for session data.

features.name: Prompt slot feature
features.description: Adds a prompt slot feature to the core functionality.

features.name: Single target plugin entrypoints
features.description: Adds single target plugin entrypoints.

features.name: AI SDK v6 support
features.description: Adds support for AI SDK v6.

features.name: TUI plugins support
features.description: Adds support for TUI plugins.

features.name: PowerShell support on Windows
features.description: Added first-class PowerShell support on Windows.

features.name: Kimi System Prompt
features.description: Adds a dedicated system prompt for Kimi models.

features.name: OTLP Observability Export Support
features.description: Adds support for exporting observability data using the OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP).

features.name: Full HTTP Proxy Support
features.description: Adds full support for using HTTP proxies.

features.name: Alibaba Provider Support
features.description: Adds support for the Alibaba provider, including cache support.

features.name: Custom Workspace Adaptors
features.description: Plugins can now register custom workspace adaptors that appear in workspace creation.

features.name: Compaction Autocontinue Hook
features.description: Added the experimental `compaction.autocontinue` hook to stop auto-continuing after compaction.

features.name: Alibaba Provider Support with Cache
features.description: Added Alibaba provider support with cache support.

features.name: Session Permission Updates
features.description: Sessions can now update project permissions mid-run.

features.name: Beta Desktop Settings to Hide Title Bar Tools
features.description: Added beta desktop settings to hide title bar tools like navigation, search, terminal, status, and file tree.

features.name: LLM Gateway Provider
features.description: Adds LLM Gateway as a provider, including config support and model usage reporting.

features.name: NVIDIA Provider
features.description: Added NVIDIA as a built-in provider option, including connection docs and required attribution headers.

features.name: Separate Terminal Font Setting
features.description: Added a separate terminal font setting and bundled JetBrainsMono Nerd Font Mono.

features.name: HTTP API GET /config endpoint
features.description: Adds a `GET /config` endpoint to the experimental HTTP API.

features.name: Session Progress Bar Setting
features.description: Adds a setting to hide the session progress bar while the agent is working.

features.name: Custom Icon Override
features.description: Projects can now store a custom icon override.

features.name: HTTP API for MCP server status
features.description: Added an experimental HTTP API endpoint for MCP server status.

features.name: HTTP API for file operations
features.description: Added experimental HTTP API endpoints to list files, read file contents, and check project file status.

features.name: Roslyn LSP support for Razor, `.cshtml`, and C# script files
features.description: Adds Roslyn Language Server Protocol (LSP) support for Razor, `.cshtml`, and C# script files, enabling enhanced code editing features such as IntelliSense, code completion, and error checking within these file types.

commands.name: /init
commands.description: Generate AGENTS.md in project root. Auto-analyzes project structure and coding patterns.

commands.name: /connect
commands.description: Connect to LLM provider. Use for OpenCode Zen (opencode.ai/auth).

commands.name: /undo
commands.description: Revert last changes. Shows original prompt for editing and retry.

commands.name: /share
commands.description: Create shareable conversation link, copy to clipboard.

commands.name: /export
commands.description: Redacts PII and confidential transcript data from exported data.

current.description: Auto-approves non-denied permission prompts when used with the `opencode run` command.
Redacts PII and confidential transcript data during export.

env_vars.name: OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT
env_vars.purpose: Inline config as JSON string. Highest priority override.

env_vars.name: EXA_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Passed to the `websearch` tool to reduce rate limits.

env_vars.name: OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES
env_vars.purpose: Support for custom telemetry resource tags.

models.note: Curated and tested by OpenCode team

breaking_changes.title: Removed anthropic oauth plugin
breaking_changes.description: The anthropic oauth plugin has been removed.
breaking_changes.migration: Users relying on the anthropic oauth plugin will need to find alternative authentication methods.

breaking_changes.title: Remove workspace server and WorkspaceContext
breaking_changes.description: The workspace server and WorkspaceContext have been removed to improve routing architecture.
breaking_changes.migration: Update your application to use the new routing architecture.

breaking_changes.title: Plugin Install Scripts Blocked
breaking_changes.description: Package install scripts are now blocked from running during plugin installation.
breaking_changes.migration: Ensure plugins do not rely on package install scripts for proper functionality.

breaking_changes.title: Diff metadata format
breaking_changes.description: The diffs contained in the metadata for the edit and patch tool will no longer contain a `to` and `from` field with full file contents. they will only contain a `patch` field with the unified diff. Additionally all snapshot diffs contained in user message and session diff will follow this format.
breaking_changes.migration: Update code to use the `patch` field instead of `to` and `from` fields when processing diff metadata.

breaking_changes.title: `UserMessage.variant` field location
breaking_changes.description: The `variant` field in `UserMessage` is now nested under `model`, so it should be accessed as `userMessage.model.variant`.
breaking_changes.migration: Update code to access the variant field as `userMessage.model.variant` instead of `userMessage.variant`.

breaking_changes.title: `UserMessage.variant` field moved
breaking_changes.description: The `variant` field of the `UserMessage` object is now nested under the `model` field. It is now accessed as `userMessage.model.variant`.
breaking_changes.migration: Update code to access the variant field as `userMessage.model.variant`.

breaking_changes.title: Diff metadata
breaking_changes.description: The diffs contained in the metadata for the edit and patch tool will no longer contain a `to` and `from` field with full file contents. they will only contain a `patch` field with the unified diff. Additionally all snapshot diffs contained in user message and session diff will follow this format
breaking_changes.migration: Update code to use the `patch` field instead of `to` and `from` fields for diff metadata.

breaking_changes.title: `UserMessage.variant`
breaking_changes.description: The `variant` field of the user message is now nested under `model` so `userMessage.model.variant`
breaking_changes.migration: Update code to access the variant field via `userMessage.model.variant` instead of `userMessage.variant`.

requirements: Modern terminal recommended: WezTerm, Alacritty, Ghostty, Kitty
At least one LLM provider API key

support_matrix.agent_def_format: Markdown with YAML frontmatter OR JSON in config
